argv: const fs=require('fs');const files=['phase-brainstorm','phase-plan','phase-spec','phase-tasks','phase-implement','phase-pr-review'].map(f=>'skills/sdlc/references/'+f+'.md');const missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes('Presenting questions to the human'));if(missing.length){console.error('missing contract pointer: '+missing.join(', '));process.exit(1)}
